ai_tips: Starting out at 1007m — HR opened at 108 and stayed calm through the opening stretch, a patient warm-up. 从海拔1007米出发——心率从108起步，开场阶段保持平稳，是很有耐心的热身。
0.61km in — pace 4:39/km, HR 145 (97% of the run average) as the effort builds. 进行到0.61公里——配速4:39/公里，心率145（全程均值的97%），强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 37m of the 121m climb done, grade here 0.9%, HR 162. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——121米总爬升已完成37米，此处坡度0.9%，心率162。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 1128m at 3.38km, HR 144. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点1128米，位于3.38公里处，心率144。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -21.2% at 4.59km — you kept it controlled at 10:58/km, protecting the legs. 全天最陡的下坡：4.59公里处坡度-21.2%——你稳健控制在10:58/公里，保护了腿部。
4.70km — late-run check: pace 12:15/km, HR 135, effort showing as the pace slips. 4.70公里——后程检查：配速12:15/公里，心率135，疲劳显现，配速下滑。

Finished 4.93km in 36:12 (avg 7:21/km, avg HR 149, max 171, +129m). Next time, close with 2-3 minutes of easy jogging to bring HR down before stopping. 完成4.93公里，用时36:12（平均配速7:21/公里，平均心率149，最高171，爬升129米）。下次结尾慢跑2-3分钟，让心率降下来再停。
